thread_title: 蘿坦調整補強負提升，希望再審視 The changes of Lotan are totally messed up. Hope the devs will take a sec to look

content:
V2.4.2.0 Service suspension and maintenance announcement

1. Lotan's "Primal Leviathan": Rouse "Battle Thirst" is enhanced, and Lotan's "Defence" makes the next "Blade of Defiance" this turn take effect 2 times.

2. Fixed the issue where the damage increase effect of the Awakener "Lotan" in the Gnosis Rouse "Battle Thirst" erroneously activated twice for the Command Card "Blade of Defiance"

First of all, It was first stated that the reason for the enhancement was to compensate for the  underpowered character, yet the adjustment resulted in a negative improvement—that is truly putting the cart before the horse.

Known enhancements:

Defense makes "Blade of Defiance" effective x2

The problem is that the defense occupies the reconciliation and the need to specify the card drawing requirements (you need to draw defense and defiance in 1 turn). 

Defiance cannot be reduced "Blade of Defiance" cost without striking.

Now Lotan need to draw defense but she have not any skill design to support the draw. 

The operation adjustment is becoming more and more lengthy, which is puzzling and don't forget that this also requires binding +12 activation

Fix bug aspect:

If a single piece of "Blade of Defiance" has 5 hits > 4 hits, the total damage will be reduced by 20%, and the team playing method that relies on the number of paragraphs multiplied by the area will be affected

The conclusion is that Rotan's reinforcement this time is obviously a negative improvement, what is writing enhancement, and actual weakening

Can I draw defense + rebellion every time at the same time?

Use Ramona: Timeworn to support Lotan 's low damage rate, then I might as well use the Ramona: Timeworn to be the main damage dealer, the Ramona: Timeworn +12 has unlimited effect and no any reason to use Lotan. 

Is true binding Ramona: Timeworn guaranteed to be enough to keep records every time it is activated?

No, there's Aliemus harmonization. Did the devs forget?
thread_title: 蘿坦調整補強負提升，希望再審視 The changes of Lotan are totally messed up. Hope the devs will take a sec to look

content:
Considering that Lotan's limit, the calculation force adjustment and the most conservative one must also need 3 blows + 1 defense + 1 defiance, spend 5 cards harmonization to work, and other teammates are vying for the last 5 cards for the on buff, debuff and survive. 
Dont forget Lotan have not any skill design to support the draw. 
If the teammates support to draw, then more cards harmonization.

Defense cannot be used to reduce cost for "Blade of Defiance".

If I want to find defense, I might as well copy "Blade of Defiance" directly with seeds. 

An old character, or even four characters in the initial plot, is the treatment of her own characters so poor? 

It is completely inferior to an suddenly-appearing character like Moxia , steal Lotan's skill design and we still need to suppress our old friend now?

None of the four "Blade of Defiance" shots caused a pursuit pain by Lord Moxia with two arbitrary blows and then Moxia could still stack 25% final injury buff.

Is Lotan a broken character so good that she can play new roles?

Does she really need to be adjusted like this?

I'm not asking you not to fix bugs, but you must at least compensate for the corresponding injuries, right?

Even if Lotan has bugs, she still makes it onto the buff list. This round of Lotan's adjustment is a negative improvement that is completely contrary to your goal.

So, is that all that you observe about the star chapter which lasts one year?

Why does every Lotan buff just mean loads more poison points?

Last time, the Rouse effect. 

Max of 20% temporar final injury and Lotan attack each hit to get 2%buff.
thread_title: 蘿坦調整補強負提升，希望再審視 The changes of Lotan are totally messed up. Hope the devs will take a sec to look

content:
At least 3 blow and 1 "Blade of Defiance" to get the max effect. 

However the "Blade of Defiance" is the main damage of Lotan so much damage lost on the effect during the process

Limited by the 10 card harmonization. Lotan can't make effective use of the effect.

You should know the new character Moxia . 

Any 2 blow to spark once pursuit (max 4 pursuit each turn).  No any draw and luck. No more card harmonization. For each pursuit of Moxia , the final injury of 25% (max 100%) is increased.  

So, Is Lotan such a broken character that she’s strong enough to replace new characters?

This time, the damage in the multiplier area was missing and did not compensate for it and the effect work on the defense to get the buff of  "Blade of Defiance".

At least 3 blow 1 defense and 1 "Blade of Defiance" to get the max effect in 1 turn now.
 
Lotan was tied by the bunch of cards. 

In many cases, we need to copy more "Blade of Defiance" due to insufficient damage output, to make up for the deficit.

Don't forget that Lotan is not Helot: Catena.
No any high damage.
There is no 30% damage rate of Moxia 4 semi-automatic permanent pursuit. Without a pursuit of Moxia , the final injury of 25%(max 100%) is greatly improved. 
No skill can record card replication.

The damage rate of "Blade of Defiance" is just 15%.
It never grow, it never work on automatically triggered. 
"Blade of Defiance" needs to draw cards and use to reconcile. 
The max of 20% temporar final injury and Lotan attack one hit to get 2%.

I literally can’t tell you guys put any real thought into these tweaks at all. Is this seriously what you call balance?

The whole point of buffing a character is to fix their weaknesses and balance things out. If your “adjustment” ends up making them worse, that just amounts to a straight negative enhancement outcome.

The changes of Lotan are totally messed up. I hope the devs will take a second look at this.
